originalTitle: Zimbabwe says 15 nationals killed after being lured to fight for Russia
title: Zimbabwe says 15 nationals killed after being lured to fight for Russia
content: Zimbabwe says it is engaging the Russian government to repatriate bodies and bring home those still alive.

originalTitle: UN votes to recognise enslavement of Africans as 'gravest crime against humanity'
title: UN votes to recognise enslavement of Africans as 'gravest crime against humanity'
content: The landmark resolution calls for an apology and contributions to a reparations fund, without specifying an amount.

originalTitle: South Africa's police chief to appear in court over controversial health contract
title: South Africa's police chief to appear in court over controversial health contract
content: South African authorities declined to disclose the charges he will face when he stands in the dock.

title: AFCON & CAF: Justice or Chaos?
content: Senegal won 2025 AFCON but CAF overturned the result and handed the title to Morocco to make them champions.

originalTitle: Iranian naval commander Alireza Tangsiri killed in attack, says Israel
title: Iranian naval commander Alireza Tangsiri killed in attack, says Israel
content: Defence Minister claims Israel killed Alireza Tangsiri, citing his role in blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

originalTitle: Video: Storms wash away vehicles and flood homes across Middle East
title: Video: Storms wash away vehicles and flood homes across Middle East
content: Vehicles were washed away in floods in Oman and homes were flooded in Syria as storms brought floods across the region.

originalTitle: Are the US and Iran holding peace talks, and what do both sides want?
title: Are the US and Iran holding peace talks, and what do both sides want?
content: There is indirect contact and channels between the two sides - but a deal may still be a long way off.

originalTitle: Prepare for turbulence - how a prolonged Middle East conflict could reshape how we fly
title: Prepare for turbulence - how a prolonged Middle East conflict could reshape how we fly
content: The Gulf's hub airports made long-distance travel cheaper - but now their future looks unclear.

originalTitle: Campaigners welcome Meta and YouTube's defeat in landmark social media addiction trial
title: Campaigners welcome Meta and YouTube's defeat in landmark social media addiction trial
content: A woman has been awarded $6m in a verdict that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

originalTitle: 'Not for us to ride the rollercoaster' - what Wales must do to win World Cup play-off
title: 'Not for us to ride the rollercoaster' - what Wales must do to win World Cup play-off
content: As Wales host Bosnia-Herzegovina in a World Cup play-off semi-final, head coach Craig Bellamy explains what his side must do to win.

originalTitle: Bosnia boss Barbarez refuses to apologise to Cooper
title: Bosnia boss Barbarez refuses to apologise to Cooper
content: Sergei Barbarez had accused Steve Cooper of dropping midfielder Benhamin Tahirovic from the Danish side in the build up to this week's qualifier.

originalTitle: Gattuso's sleepless nights as Italy face fearless Northern Ireland
title: Gattuso's sleepless nights as Italy face fearless Northern Ireland
content: Manager Michael O'Neill says Northern Ireland's young side will play without fear in Thursday's World Cup play-off against Italy.
